enzyme_source: C. albicans MY1208 protoplast membrane preparation
source_quote: L-687781 showed 1,3-beta-D-glucan synthesis IC50 = 0.16 +/- 0.04 uM in C. albicans membrane preparations.
notes: Detailed Results paragraph gives IC50 values in uM and reports L-687781 = 0.16 +/- 0.04 uM; the abstract prints the same IC50 series with ug/ml, so the curated unit follows the detailed Results text. The assay used C. albicans MY1208 protoplast membranes and was described as a modification of Cabib and Kang.

enzyme_source: digitonin-treated C. albicans A9540 protoplast suspension
readout: radiolabeled UDP-glucose incorporation into TCA-precipitated glucan
source_quote: Under such assay conditions, the IC50 value of BU-4794F was determined to be 0.25 ug/ml.
notes: Converted value estimated from reported formula C45H58O16 and exact mass 854.3725 Da: 0.25 ug/mL is approximately 0.29 uM.
